title: Monthstarter Orbit
objective: Survive a 3-minute run by correctly starting glowing month tasks as they orbit outward from the center, building combo through all nine months without letting the project stall.

controls.outcome: Scores if the orb belongs to the currently highlighted month lane before it reaches the vanish ring.
Avoids a mistake when a non-active month sends decoy orbs across the screen.

controls.input: Fast tap on the bell icon orb
controls.outcome: Instantly shifts the active month early, saving a threatened combo but changing priorities.

steps: A bright month wedge around the arena is always highlighted, clearly showing which lane is live now.
Neon orbs launch from the center 'Started' core and travel along month lanes toward outer deadline rings.
Tap only the orbs in the active month lane before they cross the outer ring; each clean hit raises combo and score multiplier.
Every few seconds a telegraphed pulse sweeps to the next month, and the active lane changes, forcing the player to abandon some targets and
Special Start Bell orbs appear during lane shifts; tapping one skips the timer and advances the month immediately for a risky combo route.
The run ends after three missed active-lane orbs or three wrong taps, creating a clear fail state.
scoring: Each correct tap gives base points; every 5 clean starts increases the multiplier up to x6. Missing an active orb or tapping a wrong lane breaks combo. Final score feeds a simple offline local leaderboard for best single
tips: Watch the glowing month wedge first; it is the only lane that matters right now.
The sweep pulse warns the next lane change a beat early, so stop chasing late orbs.
Use Start Bell orbs only when the current lane is overcrowded or a combo is about to break.
Audio helps: active-lane hits ring high, wrong taps buzz low, and month shifts land on a strong synth beat.

trendContext.title: 9 Months ago we started our hobby game project. How can we improve?
